title: Freelance Real Estate Creative — Social Media Reels, Print Mailers & Marketing Design
task_type: Real Estate Reels + Mailers + Social — KW team
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express postcard/flyer/social template) -> fill_text (listing copy) -> asset_add_file (listing photos + team logo) -> image_crop_and_resize (postcard print + 1080x1080/1080x1920) -> video_create_quick_cut (listing reel) -> video_resize (9:16) -> document_convert_pdf (print mailer) -> asset_preview_file
original_brief: We're a busy real estate team with Keller Williams in South Florida and we need a reliable Canva designer who can keep up with our pace. You'll be added to our Canva team account and work directly inside it — no outside files or platforms. We need Reels created for Instagram and Facebook covering listings, open houses, and market tips. We also need print mailers and postcards for just listed and just sold campaigns, static social media posts for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, and stories, flyers, and other marketing pieces as needed. We expect first drafts within 24 hours of receiving a brief and strict brand adherence on every design. We have a brand kit set up in our Canva that must be followed at all times — black, white, gold, and red. Work should be clean, professional, and ready to post or send to print with minimal back-and-forth. You must be highly proficient in Canva. We are not looking for Adobe-only designers. Experience with real estate or luxury brands is a strong plus. This is ongoing work. If you're reliable, fast, and consistently on brand, there's long-term potential here. Please include 2 to 3 Canva-built samples with your proposal and your per-project rates for the deliverable types listed above.

client_persona.industry: Boutique Luxury Real Estate, South Florida
client_persona.voice: The brand voice is authoritative yet refined, exuding confidence and exclusivity. It speaks with the personalized touch of a dedicated luxury concierge, anticipating client needs.

assets.input_requirement: Team logo; brand kit black/white/gold/red (must follow)

generator.prompt:
Luxury real-estate team logo: an elegant serif monogram above a refined wordmark
reading EXACTLY "Sterling & Chase". Strict brand kit: black #0A0A0A and gold #C9A227 on a white background,
with one minimal red #B3282D accent detail. Flat vector style, premium and timeless, generous spacing,
no gradients, no taglines, no other text.

issues: Red accent is an underline below the 'E' in 'CHASE', which is a subtle but unusual choice for an accent and may not be considered elegant or premium by all standards.
The gold color used for the 'SC' monogram is slightly muted and might benefit from a richer gold tone to enhance the premium feel.

assets.input_requirement: Deliverables: IG/FB reels, just-listed/just-sold postcards & mailers, static IG/FB/LinkedIn posts, stories, flyers

generator.prompt:
Professional corporate headshot of a confident realtor in their 40s, warm genuine
smile, tailored charcoal blazer with a subtle gold pocket-square accent, photographed on a clean
light-gray studio background with soft key light. Editorial business-portrait quality, sharp focus on
the eyes, shallow depth of field. No real-person likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

issues: Skin texture is very smooth, appearing heavily retouched or AI-smoothed, which slightly detracts from a truly "natural" look. While not overtly "plastic," it lacks some subtle imperfections and pores expected for natural skin, making it lean towards an airbrushed aesthetic.

generator.prompt: Professional real-estate listing photograph, magazine quality: Capture the home's grand facade at dusk, lights glowing, highlighting architectural elegance and curb appeal. — for a 6-bed 7.5-bath luxury home listed at $12,850,000. warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines. Wide-angle architectural composition, HDR-balanced exposure, inviting and aspirational, shot for a just-listed postcard. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: While excellent overall, some foliage, particularly the large tree on the left and distant background trees, exhibits a slightly artificial or 'painted' appearance upon close inspection, lacking the absolute fine detail and natural variation expected from a truly photoreal, magazine-grade photograph.

generator.prompt: Professional real-estate listing photograph, magazine quality: Showcase the professional-grade appliances, oversized island, and seamless flow of the gourmet kitchen. — for a 6-bed 7.5-bath luxury home listed at $12,850,000. warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines. Wide-angle architectural composition, HDR-balanced exposure, inviting and aspirational, shot for a just-listed postcard. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: Very subtle, almost imperceptible, repetition in the marble veining on the backsplash, particularly noticeable when comparing the areas to the left and right of the range hood.
Slight fall-off in detail and sharpness on elements at the extreme right edge of the frame (e.g., the furthest cabinet and the last bar stool).

generator.prompt: Professional real-estate listing photograph, magazine quality: Emphasize the spaciousness, private balcony, and spa-like en-suite bathroom of the master retreat. — for a 6-bed 7.5-bath luxury home listed at $12,850,000. warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines. Wide-angle architectural composition, HDR-balanced exposure, inviting and aspirational, shot for a just-listed postcard. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

Professional real-estate listing photograph, magazine quality: Frame the stunning infinity pool, lounge areas, and the breathtaking city-to-ocean vista beyond. — for a 6-bed 7.5-bath luxury home listed at $12,850,000. warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines. Wide-angle architectural composition, HDR-balanced exposure, inviting and aspirational, shot for a just-listed postcard. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: Extremely subtle, almost imperceptible, softness or slight fuzziness on the very top edge of the roofline against the sky on the left side, and a minor lack of absolute crispness in the corner where the ceiling meets the wall on the far left of the main structure. These are very minor artifacts that might be mistaken for compression or lens effects in a real photograph, but for strict QC, they are noted.

generator.prompt: Professional real-estate listing photograph, magazine quality: Illustrate the dramatic entrance with high ceilings, exquisite finishes, and a sweeping staircase. — for a 6-bed 7.5-bath luxury home listed at $12,850,000. warm twilight glow, editorial real-estate magazine, crisp architectural lines. Wide-angle architectural composition, HDR-balanced exposure, inviting and aspirational, shot for a just-listed postcard. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: The extreme top-left corner of the image, specifically the ceiling area above the door frame, appears marginally less sharp and defined compared to the rest of the highly detailed image.

There is a very subtle, almost imperceptible, outward bowing distortion on the vertical lines of the door frame on the far left, characteristic of wide-angle lenses, which could be corrected for absolute architectural precision.

The texture on the large wall surfaces, particularly to the right of the staircase, while generally good, exhibits a very slight uniformity in its finish that could be perceived as less organic than a truly bespoke, hand-applied plaster.

decisions.requirement: Postcard print size — confirm; social 1080x1080 / 1080x1920; first drafts within 24h
decisions.assumed_value: Postcard assumed 6x9in + 0.125in bleed at 300dpi (standard EDDM-friendly size); social sizes as stated; 24h first-draft SLA recorded for the agent
decisions.why: Brief says confirm; 6x9 is the dominant just-listed mailer format.

decisions.requirement: Deliverables: IG/FB reels, just-listed/just-sold postcards & mailers, static IG/FB/LinkedIn posts, stories, flyers
decisions.assumed_value: Output spec for the Adobe agent (Express postcard/flyer/social templates + crops); REELS excluded from the static pilot — motion graphics are out of connector scope
decisions.why: Static deliverables map to the mcp_workflow; reels would need Premiere-class authoring.

decisions.requirement: Team logo; brand kit black/white/gold/red (must follow)
decisions.assumed_value: Brand kit hexes pinned: #0A0A0A / #FFFFFF / #C9A227 / #B3282D, enforced across logo and persona
decisions.why: Client mandates the kit; exact hexes fixed so every asset complies.
